title: Cloud Cost Mindset
author: Michael
summary: Groupon completed its migration to the cloud in February 2023. Shortly thereafter our data centers were completely shut down and the equipment cleaned up. The move to the cloud has brought many advantages to Groupon engineering. Our infrastructure can now dynamically scale with our traffic throughout the year and engineering resources can be easily started up or turned off as…

title: Exporting Node Modules in 2022
author: David Bushong
summary: Groupon maintains literally hundreds of NPM modules, both open source and internal. author: Nida Pervez
